response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process improvements. His background exceeds the 6-year requirement and includes key differentiators like AI agent development and cross-platform engineering.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across multiple enterprise contexts.
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching a required skill.
Strong track record of open-source contributions, testing frameworks, and dev-ops practices (CI/CD, GitLab, Kubernetes).
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent tools (Node.js, testing libraries) are present.
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team.
Some roles list DLang and C++ heavily; may raise questions about recent focus on core required stack.
